female_character.description: Mature female teacher in her late 30s with long flowing chestnut brown hair, wearing a fitted black pencil skirt, white button-up blouse with top two buttons undone, strappy black heeled sandals, and glasses perched on head. Curvy figure with hourglass shape, 5'7" height, full lips, and warm hazel eyes. Natural make-up with a hint of blush and matte lipstick.

male_character.description: Athletic high school student in his early 20s, short tousled blonde hair, lean muscular build with defined abs, wearing an open white collared shirt revealing hairy chest and loose black shorts. Pale skin with visible freckles across shoulders and back. 6'0" height with broad shoulders and long legs.

lighting: Warm afternoon sunlight streaming through large windows, mixing with soft overhead fluorescent hum. Golden hour glow creating gentle shadows and highlights across skin. Natural mixed lighting with amber tones from sunbeams and cool white from ceiling fixtures.
art_type: Cinematic photorealistic with slight film grain
